channel.title: NVO987 Identity Feed
channel.description: Decentralized identity, research updates, and machine-readable infrastructure of NVO987.

item.title: Identity Node Initialized
item.description: The decentralized identity node (did:web:identity.nvo987.us) has been deployed and is publicly accessible.

item.title: DID Document Published
item.description: The DID document defining the cryptographic identity and service endpoints is now available.

item.title: Knowledge Graph Infrastructure Connected
item.description: Machine-readable knowledge graph endpoints are integrated into the identity infrastructure.
